title: Spinner
description: Foldkit-native shadcn base-nova Spinner helper with local inline SVG rendering, status semantics, and examples across badges, buttons, items, input groups, RTL, custom icons, and sizes.
markdown:
# Spinner

## Overview

Spinner is a Foldkit-native port of the shadcn base-nova Spinner helper. It renders the origin loader-circle SVG footprint with `data-slot="spinner"`, status semantics, and the `size-4 animate-spin` class contract.

## Foldkit Model

Spinner is a stateless render helper. It owns no Model, Message, update function, or Command. Parent views decide when loading is true and render Spinner as a fact of that state.

## Usage

Import the helper from the generated registry source and render it directly or through the `toView` seam.

```ts
Spinner<Message>({
  className: 'size-6',
})
```

Use `attributes` for extra SVG attributes such as `data-icon="inline-start"` when composing inside Button, Badge, Item, or Input Group examples.

## Examples

The registry includes live examples for basic Item composition, badges, disabled buttons, custom loader icons, Input Group composition, Empty composition, RTL content, and size overrides.

## Accessibility

Spinner renders `role="status"` and `aria-label="Loading"` by default. Use the optional `ariaLabel` when a parent needs more specific loading copy.

## Foldkit Differences

The origin shadcn implementation imports `Loader2Icon` from `lucide-react`. This registry item replaces that dependency with a local inline SVG path so installable source stays Foldkit-native while preserving the same root attributes and visual footprint.

registry.reason: Spinner badge examples compose the local shadcn Badge registry item.
Spinner button examples compose the local shadcn Button registry item.
Spinner Input Group examples compose the local shadcn Input Group registry item.
SpinnerEmpty composes the local shadcn Empty registry item now that plan 074 provides it.
Spinner demo and RTL examples compose the local shadcn Item registry item.
Spinner uses local class canonicalization and Tailwind conflict handling.

runtime.reason: Provides Html, Attribute, and html factory APIs for the Foldkit-native helper and examples.
Provides Effect Schema style options for Spinner metadata.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.
Provided through the local utils/cn registry dependency.

development.reason: Origin icon package usage is replaced by local inline SVGs.
Origin RTL language selector usage is replaced by deterministic local RTL labels.
React is origin fixture evidence only, not installable Foldkit source.

deviations.summary: Loader icons and RTL labels use local inline SVGs and deterministic strings instead of lucide-react and the origin language selector runtime.
deviations.rationale: Installable source cannot depend on lucide-react or the origin app language selector. Local SVGs and labels preserve the rendered footprint needed by Spinner examples.
